This PR fixes the compatibility.

vllm.title: [Model] Port over CLIPVisionModel for VLMs
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR picks up the TODO task in #3042 to port over CLIPVisionModel from transformers for LlavaForConditionalGeneration and LlavaNextForConditionalGeneration
Note:

gelu_quick CustomOp was added because of CLIPMLP.
We will still use CLIPAttention since it doesn't make too much since to use paged at

vllm.title: [Kernel] Update Cutlass int8 kernel configs for SM80
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR:

Add 6 int8 Cutlass Kernel configurations for different Gemm shape regimes.

M in [0, 16]
M in (16, 32]
M in (32, 64]
M in (64, 128] and N < 8192
M in (64, 128] and N >= 8192
M in (128, inf)


Add dispatching to the correct configuration based on the Gemm problem shape.

The kernel configur

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix the CUDA version check for FP8 support in the CUTLASS kernels
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The FP8 linear layers currently check torch.version.cuda to see if the CUTLASS kernels support FP8, but this can result in an error if this is greater than the CUDA version that the cutlass kernels are compiled with.
This PR pushes the check into C++. We can also do something like this main...neural

vllm.title: [Frontend] Add FlexibleArgumentParser to support both underscore and dash in names
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Per @youkaichao's request in #5688:

can we make _ and - both available for all args? e.g. when parsing args, convert underscore to dash before passing it to the arg parser. then users can use either one, while we only need to deal with the dash one.

This PR makes an inherited class from argparse.A

vllm.title: [distributed][misc] use fork by default for mp
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fixes #5637
fork is not safe after we create cuda context. we should already avoid initializing cuda context before we create workers, so it should be fine to use fork, which can remove the necessity of if __name__ = "__main__" in user's code.

vllm.title: [Model] MLPSpeculator speculative decoding support
vllm.author: JRosenkranz
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This is a PR to include MLPSpeculator from fms. This feature will improve inference performance significantly with minimal effort from the user by leveraging the existing speculative decoding framework with an improved speculator architecture implementation. The architecture itself is similar to med

vllm.title: [Kernel] Add punica dimension for Qwen2 LoRA
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The intermediate size of all qwen2 models is not supported by punica yet.

qwen2-0.5b: 4864
qwen2-1.5b: 8960
qwen2-7b: 18944
qwen2-72b: 29568、29696 (gptq/awq version)

This pr add punica dimension for qwen2 LoRA. It also support qwen2 lora with some tensor parallel sizes.

vllm.title: [Core][Distributed] add shm broadcast
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
a protocol to use shared memory to broadcast Python objects
without this pr:
Throughput: 32.76 requests/s, 16774.75 tokens/s
with this pr:
Throughput: 33.91 requests/s, 17359.39 tokens/s
benchmark command: python benchmarks/benchmark_throughput.py --output-len 256 --input 256 --model meta-llama/Llam

vllm.title: [Kernel][CPU] Add Quick `gelu` to CPU
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#5591 introduced a new activation function gelu_quick for porting CLIPVisionModel - This PR registers this function to CPU
XPU Ops is left to be implemented.
